intro:
From cash register to fryer—you've got to manage it all!
Take on waves of customers all by yourself!
description:
Run a convenience store solo in this frantic action game!
Dash around the store handling tasks while customers keep pouring in!
Feel the exhilaration of handling one task after another!

Rush around during peak busy hours!
Time is limited, so think fast and prioritize as you move around the store!
Complete every task, and you just might become a true solo shift master!

[The Work Never Ends!]
Operate the cash register, restock shelves, cook with the fryer, clean, and collect items.
Work efficiently to stay on top of it all!

[Decision-Making is Key!]
Good planning and prioritization make all the difference!
Assess the situation before you act!

[A Different Store Every Stage]
Each stage features a different store layout!
Adapt your strategy to match!

[Score Attack]
Earn stars based on your performance!
Work at maximum efficiency and aim for a perfect 3-star rating!

[2-Player Mode]
Play co-op as a worker and support robot team!
Split up tasks and work together strategically!
